title: SpellArchetype
description: Luminary VFX archetype definition — data-driven spell/effect sequences.

id.description: Unique archetype identifier. System archetypes are lowercase_snake. User archetypes must use 'user:' prefix.

phases.description: Named phases executed in declaration order. Keys are phase names (e.g. 'buildup', 'release', 'projectile').

loopPhase.description: Which phase loops until externally stopped (e.g. 'hold' for sustained beam, 'channel' for long cast). Must match a key in phases.

duration.description: Phase duration in seconds. Use 99 for phases controlled by external stop signal (loopPhase).

effects.description: Primitives spawned simultaneously at phase start.

primitive.description: Primitive ID from the Luminary catalog (v1.0: 12 primitives).

scale.description: Scale multiplier. [start, end] interpolates over phase duration.

opacity.description: Alpha value 0.0–1.0. [start, end] interpolates over phase duration.

speed.description: Emission/expansion speed. Negative values = inward (gather effects).

length.description: Trail length for ribbon_trail (seconds of trail history).

size.description: Base size for energy_orb and similar.

rotation.description: Rotation speed in radians/sec for hex_rune.

oneOf.description: Static value — constant for entire phase.
[startValue, endValue] — linearly interpolated over phase duration.
